Get Records

Purpose

Get records from a module or fetch one record by ID.

Endpoints

  • GET /{module_api_name}
  • GET /{module_api_name}/{record_id}

Request URL

{api-domain}/crm/{version}/{module_api_name}

Scope

ZohoCRM.modules.ALL

ZohoCRM.modules.leads.READ

Supported modules

Leads, Contacts and Custom

Parameters
  • fields string, mandatory
  • page integer
